languages.text: Между Эоганном и Паскалем разгорелся жаркий спор. Паскаль запрашивает вмешательства Вольного Торговца и просит найти его на мостике, когда {mf|тот|та} будет готов{mf||а} вмешаться.

A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.
languages.original_text: Между Эоганном и Паскалем разгорелся жаркий спор. Паскаль запрашивает вмешательства Вольного Торговца и просит найти его на мостике, когда {mf|тот|та} будет готов{mf||а} вмешаться.

traits.locale_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.
A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Both are requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader.

A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.
A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. They are requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader.

A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

languages.text: Zwischen Eogunn und Pasqal ist ein hitziger Streit entbrannt. Pasqal verlangt das Eingreifen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ... er wird eine Weile auf der Brücke warten, bis der Lord Captain bereit ist.
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

traits.locale_text: Zwischen Eogunn und Pasqal ist ein hitziger Streit entbrannt. Pasqal verlangt das Eingreifen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ... er wird eine Weile auf der Brücke warten, bis der Lord Captain bereit ist.

languages.text: Une vive dispute semble avoir éclaté entre Eogunn et Pasqal. Pasqal demande l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ; il attendra sur le pont que {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} soit {mf|prêt|prête} à s'exprimer.
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

traits.locale_text: Une vive dispute semble avoir éclaté entre Eogunn et Pasqal. Pasqal demande l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} ; il attendra sur le pont que {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} soit {mf|prêt|prête} à s'exprimer.

languages.text: 伊奥贡和帕斯卡之间爆发了激烈的争论。帕斯卡请求行商浪人出面裁决。他会在舰桥上等待，听候舰长大人对此事的指示。
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡和帕斯卡之间爆发了激烈的争论。帕斯卡请求行商浪人出面裁决。他会在舰桥上等待，听候舰长大人对此事的指示。

languages.text: Se ha producido una acalorada discusión entre Eogunn y Pasqal. Pasqal solicita la intervención de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente; estará esperando en el puente hasta que {mf|el|la} lord Capitán esté list{mf|o|a} para arbitrar.
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.

traits.locale_text: Se ha producido una acalorada discusión entre Eogunn y Pasqal. Pasqal solicita la intervención de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente; estará esperando en el puente hasta que {mf|el|la} lord Capitán esté list{mf|o|a} para arbitrar.

languages.text: EogunnとPasqalの間で激しい論争が勃発した。彼らはローグ・トレーダーの介入を要請している。
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. They are requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader.

languages.text: Eogunn ve Pasqal arasında hararetli bir tartışma patlak verdi. Pasqal, Hür Tacir'in müdahalesini talep ediyor. Lord Kaptan konuşmaya hazır olduğunda onu köprüde bekliyor olacak.
languages.original_text: A heated dispute has erupted between Eogunn and Pasqal. Pasqal is requesting the intervention of the Rogue Trader — he will be waiting on the bridge for a time when the Lord Captain is ready to say {mf|his|her} word.
